name: salesforce
description: Headless Salesforce REST API tool execution via Cloudflare Workers

environment_variables.name: SF_CLIENT_ID
environment_variables.description: Salesforce External Client App Consumer Key

environment_variables.name: SF_CLIENT_SECRET
environment_variables.description: Salesforce External Client App Consumer Secret

environment_variables.name: MCP_SECRET
environment_variables.description: Incoming API validation key securing the Worker endpoints

notes: Uses OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials with in-memory token caching; no Salesforce password or security token is required. Provides pipeline, contacts, accounts, opportunities, quotes (read+create), assets, tasks, file uploads, and quote line items.
